name: Two-Bean and Roasted Red Pepper Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces green beans, trimmed and cut crosswise into thirds
recipeInstructions:
1. Place dried beans in a medium saucepan.
2. Pour enough cold water over the beans to cover them by 3 inches.
3. Let stand overnight.
4. Drain the beans and return them to the same saucepan.
5. Pour enough cold water over the beans to cover them by 3 inches.
6. Bring to boil. Reduce heat; cover partially.
7. Simmer until tender, about 40 minutes.
8. Add 2 teaspoons salt to the beans and cool for 15 minutes.
9. Drain and cool the beans.
10. Char bell pepper over gas flame or under broiler until blackened on all sides.
11. Wrap in a paper bag and let stand for 10 minutes.
12. Peel and seed the pepper.
13. Cut the pepper into matchstick-size strips.
14. Cook green beans in a pot of boiling salted water just until tender, about 4 minutes.
15. Drain beans; transfer to bowl of ice water and cool.
16. Drain.
17. Using a vegetable peeler, remove peel from lemon in long strips.
18. Cut into very thin strips.
19. Combine Great Northern beans, bell pepper, green beans, lemon peel, and olives in a large bowl.
20. Mix in olive oil and both vinegars.
21. Season with salt and pepper.
